prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with carb-loading for race day preparation

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day with timing around training sessions
Macronutrient ratio emphasizes carbohydrates (55-65%) appropriate for endurance athlete with adequate protein (1.2-1.6g/kg) and fat
Total daily caloric intake aligns with high-endurance athlete needs (approximately 2,800-3,200 calories)
Includes specific meal timing recommendations relative to training/recovery windows
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high caloric intake and carb-loading focus, with specific macronutrient ratios and timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and increase strength for weightlifting competition
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegetarian, dislikes legumes and tofu, prefers simple foods

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with timing around gym session
Meets minimum 120g protein daily using vegetarian sources excluding legumes/tofu
All meals use only 3-4 ingredients maximum for simplicity
Includes specific meal times and portion sizes
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) with dietary restrictions (vegetarian) and limited food preferences, requiring compact protein sources and meal timing around gym sessions
